news.headline: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A for AI
news.detail: <cite index="2-3">Prime Intellect closed a $130 million Series A led by Radical Ventures on July 8, 2026</cite>, showing strong investor appetite for AI infrastructure.

news.headline: Quantum Systems secures $1.2B for defense tech
news.detail: <cite index="7-8">Quantum Systems raised $1.2 billion in Series D funding on July 2, 2026</cite>, signaling that European defense tech is attracting massive capital.

news.headline: Qualcomm acquires Modular for nearly $4B
news.detail: <cite index="31-11">Qualcomm announced plans to buy Modular for nearly $4 billion on June 26, 2026</cite>, demonstrating how AI infrastructure acquisitions are accelerating.

news.headline: Agentic AI becomes enterprise's top 2026 priority
news.detail: <cite index="18-5">2026 is called the year for enterprise agentic AI, with companies deploying agents for marketing and workflows</cite>, marking a shift from passive to autonomous AI tools.
